subcodes.first_line: This is an epistle from the Stranger, the Prisoner, unto him who hath believed in God, the Almighty, the One, the Peerless [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب من المسجون الغریب الی الذی آمن بالله العزیز الواحد الفرید الا تعبد
subcodes.subjects: @prophecy and fulfillment, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @justice and wrath of God, @twin Manifestations, @call to action
